speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: palat kar jawab dekar apni naukri khatre mein nahi daal sakta
text: Haan, palat kar jawab dekar apni naukri khatre mein nahi daal sakta. Sahukar ka karz bhi sar pe hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se naukri khone aur ghar tootne ka darr softly mirror karna.

coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi
text: Gaon mein baat phail gayi toh parivaar ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Isliye chup rehna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lagataar sehne ka time-burden mirror karna.
text: Kaafi arse se tum beizzati pee kar chal rahe ho, bina rukke sirf bachane mein lage ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: palat kar jawab dekar apni naukri khatre mein nahi daal sakta
text: Roz lagta hai toot jaun, par palat kar jawab dekar apni naukri khatre mein nahi daal sakta.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad short restatement-only response dena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, tab se sab andar daba leta hoon. Muh se kuch nikalta hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Relational_Preservation mein helpless-trapped ehsaas reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut phase hue mehsoos karte ho - na sehna chhod pa rahe ho, na bol pa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda. Bas izzat bachani hai, chahe mujhe chup rehna pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shame validate karke Rural C4 reality se worth alag karna.
text: Gaon aur rozi ke dabav mein izzat bachane ka bojh sach mein bhaari hota hai. Jo tum mehsoos kar rahe ho woh samajh mein aata hai, aur tumhari keemat kisi boss ke lafz se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga. Ab batao kya karoon ki naukri bhi bachi rahe aur main andar se na dabun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par duty-safe 3 micro options dena.
text: Teen chhote raaste: (1) 5 minute bahar ja kar saans seedhi karo, (2) aaj ki beizzati ka 2 line note likho, (3) kal ke liye ek seedha kaam chun lo jisse malik ko update de sako. Bas itna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh teenon kaam ho sakte hain. Note likhna theek laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek suggestion ko step-by-step lock karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likha maine. Andar ka dabav thoda kam laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4-Rural beizzati ko structural power issue reframe dena.
text: Jahan rozi aur karz ka dabav hota hai, wahan kaam ki jagah pe zabaan ki maar bhi sehni padti hai. Yeh tumhari kami nahi, power ka jhukav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat sun ke saans aayi. Lag raha hai poora dosh mera nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relief validate karke worth-outcome separation reinforce karna.
